memberdef.name: AllSuspectNames

briefdescription.para: Set up the Ai. Call once before dealing cards.
Choose between safe and deceptive (bluff) play styles.
Call once cards are dealt This auto crosses out all cards in player own hand.
Call when another player shows this AI a card Ai trting to make suggestion that they could disprove.

memberdef.argsstring: (int suggestionIndex, Suggestion suggestion, int disproverIndex, Card shownCard)
memberdef.name: OnSuggestionMade

briefdescription.para: Call after every suggestion by anyone Helps the deduction disproverIndex == -1 means nobody could disprove shownCard: only not null if Ai was suggesster/disprover Null being passed means well record the disproval as "unknwn which card".

parameterdescription.para: Index of player made the suggestion
Index of the disporver or -1 if nobody disproved
The card shown (if Known) or null

briefdescription.para: Call when its this players turn Override to drive the turn.

For each past disproval where we didn't see the card, check if we now know that 2 of the 3 cards are NOT in the disprover's hand If so,the third must be: autocross it Repeats until no progress is made (one resolved disproval can unlock another).
Updates decision weights based on detective sheet and strategy.
Give a score based on how useful it is for a suggestion Card = 0: been rulled out Cards with fewer remaing cards are given a higher score.

parameterdescription.para: Number of cards in a group not been ruled out

simplesect.para: Bias score used for choosing suggestions

briefdescription.para: Counts how many cards havent been ruled out.

parameterdescription.para: Array of card names from a group

simplesect.para: Number cards that havent been ruled out

briefdescription.para: Chooses a target room for the AI to move towards.

memberdef.argsstring: (RoomCard r1, int w1, RoomCard r2, int w2)
memberdef.name: WeightedRoomChoice

memberdef.argsstring: (RoomCard r1, int w1, RoomCard r2, int w2, RoomCard r3, int w3)
memberdef.name: WeightedRoomChoice

briefdescription.para: Choose room card: must match the room the AI is currently in.
Pick a random card weighted by cardBiases.
Pick the most likey murder cards in a category.
Pick card from the AI player own hand.
TODO: connect to Board pathfinding once available.
TODO: connect to Board room/distance logic.

detaileddescription.para: As player class not fleshed out yet, some fileds Ill do here, until it done
